strategy: Death boss (19825) with 100% incoming healing, so never heal him and expect drains to rebound. Hit with Life (+10%); never Death (75% resist).
Blading a teammate triggers a cycle on that target: Bad Juju, then Virulent Plague, then Metalops. Use All-Ally blade spells (Bladestorm etc.), which do not trigger it, or blade-and-hit in one round.
Do not chain heals: the first two heals get you Infected, the third Mass-Infects the team. Cleanse infections and heal only when needed.
After his Natural Attack he Feints his target for +75%. The hitter should avoid being the follow-up target, or clear it before the next big incoming hit.
Funnel blades to the hitter via all-ally spells and burst him. Watch for his Beguile on late joiners.
cheatNotes: A late joiner (or the last wizard standing) gets Metalops: a +200% protected Death Trap and a 3-round Beguile. Arrive on time.
Blading another wizard triggers a punish on that target. Use all-ally blade spells or blade the same round you hit.
First offense: Bad Juju on the target.
Second offense: Virulent Plague, cutting that wizard's damage.
Third offense: Metalops. Then the cycle repeats.
All-Ally blade spells like Bladestorm do not trigger this, so they are the safe way to buff your hitter.
Healing triggers an infection cycle on the healer or target.
Third heal: Mass Infection on the whole team. Cleanse and heal sparingly.
After his Natural Attack he Feints his target +75%. If that is your hitter, clear it before the next big enemy hit lands.
